dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.evidence: All required fields present: objective (6-item description), 6 deliverables with unique names and acceptance_criteria, 12 context_pointers, gate_policy='supervised', 5 constraints. No depends_on references to validate. All enum values valid.

dimensions.name: alignment
dimensions.evidence: Objective enumerates 6 items; each maps 1:1 to a deliverable. Cross-model finding (a) incorporated: constraint 4 states 'No new PostToolUse hooks' and deliverable cli-post-actions replaces original approach. No unrelated deliverables.

dimensions.name: feasibility
dimensions.evidence: All 20 acceptance criteria contain testable verbs ('returns', 'regenerates', 'refreshed', 'has', 'documents', 'symlinks') or file paths (templates/spec.md, skills/spec.md, evals/dimensions/spec.yaml, step-sequence.md, install.sh, skills/ideate.md). Scope bounded by 6 deliverables touching specific files and <=120 line context budget constraint.

dimensions.name: cross-model
dimensions.evidence: Fresh subagent review produced 3 findings: (a) PostToolUse hooks dropped — reflected in constraint 4 and cli-post-actions deliverable, (b) summary-regen as CLI post-action — reflected in cli-post-actions AC1, (c) split-into-two-rows rejected — row remains single bundle of 6 deliverables.

dimensions.name: seed-sync
dimensions.evidence: seed_id=furrow-94b3, sds show status='ideating', row step='ideate'. Mapping: ideate->ideating. Match confirmed. Seed not closed (closed_at=null).

summary: Definition is complete, aligned with user intent, feasible with testable ACs, reflects cross-model review findings, and seed status is synchronized.
